description: Inputs passed to the RedStone oracle-divergence policy WASM at evaluation time

symbol.description: Asset symbol the off-chain RedStone feed quotes (e.g. 'ETH', 'BTC').

provider.description: RedStone provider name. Defaults to 'redstone' when omitted.

rpcUrl.description: Ethereum-compatible JSON-RPC endpoint used to call the on-chain comparison oracle.

onchainOracle.description: On-chain oracle the WASM compares the RedStone price against.

selector.description: 4-byte function selector to call on the oracle (0x-prefixed). Typically the latest-answer accessor.

decimals.description: Number of decimals the oracle's return value is scaled by. Defaults to 18 when omitted.

prevSnapshot.description: Optional prior divergence snapshot used to compute sustained-divergence duration. Set to null on the first evaluation.

divergenceBp.description: Divergence (in basis points) recorded in the previous evaluation.

timestampMs.description: Unix timestamp (ms) of the previous evaluation.
